reviews.review_description:
This is a great premise. It's Tetris, but truly 3D. You are surrounded by a circular ring of pieces. Graphics are about what you'd expect. Some other backgrounds would be nice, but it's not necessary at this point.

There are some pretty glaring gameplay issues that seem very easy to fix. The first is that you can't "slide" pieces horozontally under each other at the last second for a perfect fit like you can in the original classic. The other, which is a bigger issue in my opinion, is that the lateral movement of the pieces is controlled with the headset. This seems really cool at first, until you realize how sensitive it is. I can't count how many times I've had a piece lined up perfectly, then drop it, and it's one unit off to the right or left because apparently I moved my headset a smidge. If there was a way to add L or R lateral movement of the pieces with the controller joysticks or other button rather than the headset, it would be much more fun to play.

Overall, this game has a lot to offer and I'm excited to see where it goes!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! Your feedback is very important to us!

reviews.review_description: I'm requesting control options, because aiming the blocks with my head is difficult.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! Your feedback is very important to us!

reviews.review_title: Great idea of 360 degree circle Tetris
reviews.review_description: It's the same old Tetris game but you play from inside circles of blocks, like a tower of blocks. The graphics are better in the new version. I like it, keep it up!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! Your feedback is very important to us!

reviews.review_description: Love the new take on Tetris, love the 360 aspect but can you add the option to turn using joystick so it can be played seated without swiveling around of getting neck ache. Either way still a great game and a super cheap price

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! Your feedback is very important to us!

reviews.review_description: I find the idea of a 360-degree 3D Tetris truly excellent! I particularly appreciate the feature that allows moving pieces simply by tilting the head, and the visual rendering is absolutely incredible. The app store is truly lacking in such classic games, so a big thank you to the creators of this application. I genuinely hope to see new features and updates in the future, and I am ready to purchase additional packs. To enhance the gaming experience, perhaps consider adding extra designs for Tetris pieces or introducing different environments. This would undoubtedly make the game even more captivating!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! Your feedback is very important to us!

reviews.review_description: At last i found tetris game that's compatible with VR. I really play inside circle tetris and burn blocks around me. It's the most interactive from such kind of games. I like it.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review! We are eager to bring full interactivity to the world of virtual reality!
